channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Cycle hire space vandalised, 15th May
item.description:
The new cycle hire space at the east end of Colberg Place has bee vandalised. The markers have been removed ad thrown onto stamford hill. A van is currently parked in the space.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Colberg Place, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple owners allow dog fouling, 15th May
item.description:
And don’t clean up. Also always have dogs off leash. Both are a breach.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shepherdess Walk, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unemptied bins spilling all over the pavement and into the subway, 15th May
item.description:
This is the second time in three weeks I have had to report this problem. I am a street friend and have just cleared up the mess, but why can’t you empty these two bins at least twice a week. They are currently overflowing and it will get worse as they serve the commuters using the station. It must be blindingly obvious that you need to more regularly empty these two bins as frankly I am getting fed up clearing up the mess which shouldn’t be there in the first place if you did your job properly.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pavilion Lane, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A dentist’s stool has been dumped next to the litter bin, 15th May
item.description:
A dentist’s stool has been dumped next to the litter bin. Please can you arrange for it to be removed?

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lambarde Square, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped rubbish, 15th May
item.description:
Constant fly-tipping in this area is becoming a joke,the whole estate is for that matter.as a resident of this estate i can't remember the last time I saw a cleaner.can someone please look in the this issue.thanks.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tellson Avenue, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Remove today please, 15th May
item.description:
Hello, Please remove this today. It’s been reported for a few days and it’s blocking the entry. Redruth Rd, e9

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Victoria Park Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown hedge obstructing pavement -o/s no. 36 - since 01/02/2026, 15th May
item.description:
Overgrown hedge obstructing pavement -o/s no. 36 - since 01/02/2026
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): The Avenue, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Obstruction - Overgrown / overhanging private tree / hedge

item.title: Dumped waste, 15th May
item.description:
Approx 30 black bags full of food & house waste dumped on the pavement. Bags being split open causing flies & vermin

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Plumstead High Street, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti o/s opposite brondesbury park station since 8/05/2026, 15th May
item.description:

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Park, Kilburn, London

item.title: Fly tipping, 15th May
item.description:
Bags of residential recycling and cardboard etc left outside 159
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stoke Newington Church Street, London

item.title: Unacceptable household waste, 15th May
item.description:
Pls remove

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Jenner Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped pallets, 15th May
item.description:
Pls remove

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Jenner Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Public Right of Way FP114 starting to get blocked again, 15th May
item.description:
Public Right of Way FP114 is starting to get blocked again through fly-tipping (probably by adjacent households) and low-hanging overgrowth. Once the PRoW is cleared again (at a cost to council tax payers) the adjacent households can be warned that future tipping won't be tolerated by the council.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crayford Way, Crayford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sofa Fly Tipped on Truman’s Road, 15th May
item.description:
Fly flipped sofa at the very bottom of Truman’s Road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Salcombe Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Commercial bins block pavement, 15th May
item.description:
Commercial bins blocking pavement cannot get past on mobility scooter, often there

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hainault Street, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hedge removing accesability of the pavent, 15th May
item.description:
The hedge has not been maintained and is taking up half of the pavenment. This makes it very difficult for anyone with mobility issues or families. It should be cut back so that the space on the pavement is not compromised

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, Colwell Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sapling uprooted, 15th May
item.description:
A young tree has fallen over outside 574 on A20

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sidcup Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside Perrin House, 15th May
item.description:
6 Bins on the pavement and not be placed back correctly blocking access along the pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Malvern Road, London

item.title: Fly tipping, 15th May
item.description:
As usual fly tipping by the flats on the corner of Warwick and Maidstone

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Warwick Road, Southgate

item.title: Dumped chair beside the barber shop on Plaistow Grove, 15th May
item.description:
